- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Web app: user uploads photo, app analyzes colors/objects, generates unique music.
  - Tech: JavaScript, Node.js, TensorFlow.js (or cloud API), Tone.js, React, Express.

- [ ] Scaffold the Project
- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
